description: A department head needs to approve a purchase request submitted by a staff member.

nodes.task_description: Review the pending purchase request, including the item, cost, and justification.

expected_outcome.value: The department head reviews the request for new office chairs.

nodes.task_description: Check the department's remaining budget for the relevant expense category.

expected_outcome.value: The department head confirms there are sufficient funds in the 'Office Supplies' budget.

nodes.task_description: Approve the purchase request, routing it to the procurement department.

expected_outcome.value: The department head approves the request, allowing procurement to make the purchase.
